Title: van der Grinten, Evert F.
Overview: 1962 professor of Modern Art at University of Nijmegan.
Selected Bibliography: Enqiries into the Historyof Art-Historical Writing. Amsterdam: Municipal University, 1952.Elements of Art Historiography in Medieval Texts: An Analytic Study. Translated by D. Aalders. The Hague: Martinus Nijhoff, 1969.
